pass1_quick_scan.goal: Understand the problem and whether the proposed solution works BEFORE reading how it works

questions_to_answer: What sequence modeling and transduction problems does the paper address?
What are the limitations of recurrent neural networks?
How does the proposed model differ from existing approaches?
steps.expected_output: Understanding of the problem and motivation

steps.objective: Understand the main contributions and results
questions_to_answer: What is the main contribution of the paper?
What results are reported in the paper?
How does the proposed model perform compared to existing models?
steps.expected_output: Understanding of the main contributions and results

questions_to_answer: What datasets were used for evaluation?
What metrics were used to evaluate the model?
How does the proposed model perform on different tasks?
steps.expected_output: Understanding of the results and evaluation

pass2_method_understanding.goal: Understand what was built and how it was evaluated

questions_to_answer: What is the proposed model architecture?
How does the model use self-attention?
What are the key components of the model?
Why is self-attention used in the model?
What are the benefits of self-attention?
How does self-attention differ from other attention mechanisms?
steps.expected_output: Understanding of the motivation for self-attention

questions_to_answer: How was the model trained?
What datasets were used for training?
What hyperparameters were used?

pass3_deep_analysis.goal: Critical analysis of whether the method is sound and generalizable

steps.objective: Understand the background and related work
questions_to_answer: What is the background and context of the paper?
What related work is discussed?
How does the proposed model relate to existing work?
steps.expected_output: Understanding of the background and related work

steps.objective: Analyze the model and results critically
questions_to_answer: What are the strengths and weaknesses of the model?
How do the results support the claims made in the paper?
What are the limitations of the model and results?
steps.expected_output: Critical analysis of the model and results

steps.objective: Understand the references and related work
questions_to_answer: What references are cited in the paper?
What related work is discussed?
How does the proposed model relate to existing work?
steps.expected_output: Understanding of the references and related work

final_user_task.summary_task: Summarize the main contributions and results of the paper
reflection_questions: What are the key takeaways from the paper?
How does the proposed model contribute to the field?
What are the potential applications and future directions of the work?
